title: State Forensic Science Laboratory, Madiwala, Bangaluru, under Directorate of Forensic Sciences, Karnataka, Police Department, as Examiner of Electronic Evidence within India

[F. No. 2(6)/2017-CLES] PANKAJ KUMAR, Add.
